## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test -p pear-core` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` and `cargo clippy -p pear-core -- -D warnings` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` (in `apps/desktop`) passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (`[Unreleased]`) for user-facing changes
- [ ] Updated docs (`ARCHITECTURE.md` / `ROADMAP.md`) if behavior or scope changed
